mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, `status`, flags, content, title, operator_id, operator_name, operator_org_id, operator_org_name, operator_dept_id, operator_dept_name
mapper.insert:
insert into t_upone_suggestion
gmt_create,
gmt_modified,
`status`,
flags,
content,
title,
operator_id,
operator_name,
operator_org_id,
operator_org_name,
operator_dept_id,
operator_dept_name,
#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{title,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operatorOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operatorOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operatorDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operatorDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update t_upone_suggestion
gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT},
gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
title = #{title,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
operator_id = #{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operator_name = #{operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operator_org_id = #{operatorOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operator_org_name = #{operatorOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operator_dept_id = #{operatorDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operator_dept_name = #{operatorDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_upone_suggestion set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, operator_id = #{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_name = #{operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_org_id = #{operatorOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_org_name = #{operatorOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_dept_id = #{operatorDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_dept_name = #{operatorDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_upone_suggestion (gmt_create, gmt_modified, `status`, flags, content, title, operator_id, operator_name, operator_org_id, operator_org_name, operator_dept_id, operator_dept_name) values
(#{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.title,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select
from t_upone_suggestion order by id desc limit 100
